description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a prominent white and blue instructional label on its front. The extinguisher features a silver metal handle and lever mechanism at the top, along with a black discharge nozzle attached to a short, rigid black tube. The body is smooth and metallic, with a slightly domed top and a flat base for stable placement. The label includes pictograms and text, indicating its use for various fire types, and is positioned vertically on the front. No mounting bracket, pressure gauge, or safety pin is visible, and the nozzle is fixed directly to the top assembly.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a blue and white instructional label, silver handle, and black nozzle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instructional label, handle, and black nozzle clearly.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the plain red back and the top handle assembly.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the cylindrical body, handle, and nozzle without the label visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view focusing on the black nozzle and the top of the extinguisher.
attribute_label_or_signage: A large, rectangular blue and white instructional label with pictograms and text is present on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A short, rigid black nozzle is attached to the top, extending outward and not flexible.
